old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-wtad","title":"EDHOC responder does not validate METHOD_CORR in Message 1","description":"File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs
Lines: 677

The METHOD_CORR byte is parsed but not validated:
```rust
let _method_corr = msg1[0];
```

The code assumes method 0 (SIGN_SIGN) with correlation 1. Per RFC 9528:
- method_corr = method * 4 + corr
- method 0 = Signature (Ed25519 for Suite 0)
- method 1/2/3 = Static DH variants (not implemented)

If an initiator sends method 1-3 (Static DH), the responder will:
1. Accept the message
2. Fail during signature verification (since the initiator sends MAC not signature)
3. Return SignatureVerification error instead of UnsupportedMethod

Impact: Confusing error messages; minor protocol compliance issue.

Fix: Validate method_corr == 1 (method 0, corr 1) and return appropriate error for unsupported methods.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:37:03.331942Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:37:03.331977Z"}

- method 0 = Signature (Ed25519 for Suite 0)
- method 1/2/3 = Static DH variants (not implemented)

If an initiator sends method 1-3 (Static DH), the responder will:
1. Accept the message
2. Fail during signature verification (since the initiator sends MAC not signature)
3. Return SignatureVerification error instead of UnsupportedMethod

Impact: Confusing error messages; minor protocol compliance issue.

Fix: Validate method_corr == 1 (method 0, corr 1) and return appropriate error for unsupported methods.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:37:03.331942Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:10.249003397Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:10.249003397Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:26:10.249003397Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:10.249003397Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-wtad","title":"EDHOC responder does not validate METHOD_CORR in Message 1","description":"File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs
Lines: 677

The METHOD_CORR byte is parsed but not validated:
```rust
let _method_corr = msg1[0];
```

The code assumes method 0 (SIGN_SIGN) with correlation 1. Per RFC 9528:
- method_corr = method * 4 + corr
- method 0 = Signature (Ed25519 for Suite 0)
- method 1/2/3 = Static DH variants (not implemented)

If an initiator sends method 1-3 (Static DH), the responder will:
1. Accept the message
2. Fail during signature verification (since the initiator sends MAC not signature)
3. Return SignatureVerification error instead of UnsupportedMethod

Impact: Confusing error messages; minor protocol compliance issue.

Fix: Validate method_corr == 1 (method 0, corr 1) and return appropriate error for unsupported methods.","notes":"Commit: abdfba676","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:37:03.331942Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:23:54.374776814Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:10.249003397Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:26:10.249003397Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:10.249003397Z"}

new_value: Added validation for METHOD_CORR in EdhocResponder::process_message_1; returns UnsupportedMethod for unsupported methods. Updated error enum and Display impl. Merge resolved and committed.
